lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, Psychic weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [SUSTAINED HITS 1] ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes an attack with a Psychic weapon, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Psychic

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, on a Critical Wound, the target suffers 1 mortal wound in addition to any normal damage.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: The first time this model is destroyed, roll one D6 at the end of the phase. On a 2+, set this model back up on the battlefield as close as possible to where it was destroyed and not within Engagement Range of any enemy units, with its full wounds remaining.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Psychic

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Purgation Squad
■ Strike Squad

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Fights First ability.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a melee attack that targets a Character unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll and you can re-roll the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes a melee attack, add 1 to the Wound roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While an enemy unit is within 6" of this model, each time that unit takes a Battle-shock or Leadership test, subtract 1 from that test

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, you can select one enemy unit within 18" of and visible to this Psyker (excluding units with the Lone Operative ability that are not part of an Attached unit and are not within 12" of this Psyker). If you do, roll one D6: on a 1, this Psyker’s unit suffers D6 mortal wounds; on a 2-5, that enemy unit suffers 2D3 mortal wounds; on a 6, that enemy unit suffers 2D6 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Servitors
■ Strike Squad

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly GREY KNIGHTS VEHICLE model within 6" of this model. Until the start of your next Command phase, each time that VEHICLE model makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Command phase, you can select one friendly Grey Knights Vehicle model within 3" of this model. That Vehicle model regains up to D3 lost wounds. Each model can only be selected for this ability once per turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is within 3" of one or more friendly Grey Knights Vehicle units, unless it is leading a unit, this model has the Lone Operative ability

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes a Charge move, until the end of the turn, melee weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 2+, Ignores Cover, Psychic

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Devastating Wounds, Precision

profiles.name: Champion of the Order of Purifiers (Psychic)

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to the Attacks characteristic of that unit’s Purifying Flame.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per turn, the first time a saving throw is failed for this model, change the Damage characteristic of that attack to 0

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following unit:
■ Purifier Squad

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Infantry 2+, Ignores Cover, Psychic

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Devastating Wounds, Precision

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the characteristics of models in that unit and to any roll or test made for models in that unit (excluding modifiers to saving throws).

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, one unit from your army with this ability can use it when its unit is targeted with a Stratagem. If it does, reduce the CP cost of that use of that Stratagem by 1CP.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle round, in the Fight phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it before resolving its attacks. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time that model makes an attack that targets a Monster or Vehicle unit, you can re-roll the Hit roll, you can re-roll the Wound roll and you can re-roll the Damage roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time you target this model with a Stratagem, it only costs 1CP to use, even if the CP cost is higher

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Psychic

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, each time an attack targets that unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model’s unit is selected to fight, you can select one enemy unit within Engagement Range of this model’s unit and roll one D6, adding 2 to the result if that unit has the Daemon keyword: on a 4-5, that enemy unit suffers D3 mortal wounds; on a 6+, that enemy unit suffers D3+3 mortal wounds.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Psychic

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Grey Knights Infantry models. Each Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 16 Grey Knights Infantry models. Each Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 14 Grey Knights Infantry models. Each Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Grey Knights Infantry models. It cannot transport Terminator models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Grey Knights Infantry models. It cannot transport Terminator models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of your Command phase, this model regains 1 lost wound.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that can Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 12 Grey Knights Infantry models and 1 Grey Knights Venerable Dreadnought model. Each Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time this model makes a ranged attack that targets a unit that cannot Fly, add 1 to the Hit roll

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly Grey Knights Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6" as if it were your Movement phase. If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not eligible to declare a charge

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Daemon 2+, Ignores Cover, Psychic

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Daemon 2+, Psychic

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability against mortal wounds

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Once per battle, when this model’s unit declares a charge in the same turn it was set up on the battlefield using the Deep Strike or Teleport Assault ability, add 3 to the Charge roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value:
This model can be attached to the following units:
■ Brotherhood Terminator Squad
■ Paladin Squad

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If this model is in your army, it must be your WARLORD.

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Daemon 2+, Ignores Cover, Psychic

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Keywords
lines.value: Anti-Daemon 2+, Psychic

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This model is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Advanced or Fell Back.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-4 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [INDIRECT FIRE] ability, provided the target of that weapon is visible to one or more other friendly Grey Knights Psyker units

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if this unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if this unit is Below Half-strength.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable Save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a **^^Brotherhood Techmarine^^** model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by **^^Servitor^^** models in this unit by 1

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a **^^Brotherhood Techmarine^^** (a unit cannot have more than one **^^Servitors^^** unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under you control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 30 Grey Knights Infantry models. Each Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.value: While this model has 1-5 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 30 Grey Knights Infantry models. Each Terminator model takes up the space of 2 models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While this model has 1-10 wounds remaining, each time this model makes an attack, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a unit with the Deep Strike ability disembarks from this model after it has made a Normal move, that unit is still eligible to declare a charge this turn

lines.name: Range
lines.value: Melee

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [INDIRECT FIRE] ability, provided the target of that weapon is visible to one or more other friendly Grey Knights Psyker units

lines.name: Description
lines.value: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, add 1 to the Hit roll if this unit is below its Starting Strength, and add 1 to the Wound roll as well if this unit is Below Half-strength.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: This unit has a 6+ Invulnerable Save

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a **^^Brotherhood Techmarine^^** model is leading this unit, improve the Ballistic Skill and Weapon Skill characteristics of ranged and melee weapons equipped by **^^Servitor^^** models in this unit by 1

lines.name: Description
lines.value: At the start of the Declare Battle Formations step, this unit can join one other unit from your army that is being led by a **^^Brotherhood Techmarine^^** (a unit cannot have more than one **^^Servitors^^** unit joined to it). If it does, until the end of the battle, every model in this unit counts as being part of that Bodyguard unit, and that Bodyguard unit’s Starting Strength is increased accordingly.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: If you control an objective marker at the end of your Command phase and this unit is within range of that objective marker, that objective marker remains under you control, even if you have no models within range of it, until your opponent controls it at the start or end of any turn

lines.name: Capacity
lines.value: This model has a transport capacity of 6 Grey Knights Infantry models. It cannot transport Terminator models.

lines.name: Description
lines.value: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit it scored one or more hits against this phase. Until the end of the phase, each time a friendly model that disembarked from this Transport this turn makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll

lines.name: Description
lines.value: While a friendly Grey Knights Infantry unit is within 6" of this model, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1
